calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Alkazin (Counsel for Brek Finnegan, Personal Representative), Steven Weinkauf (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Admnistrator, Special Administrator).

Counsel presented argument and rebuttal as to whether Probate Code Sec. 7604 or 8547(c) governed the allocation of attorneys fees in the subject matter. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Larry Thompson; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

Post Script: Subsequent to the hearing, the Court granted the Petition and signed the Order. RMD

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for Public Administrator. John Alkazin appearing for Brek Finnegan. The California Supreme Court has ruled that the will is not valid. Mr. Alkazin has spoken with Mr. Morgan and Mr. Morgan said he has no standing. Court is appointing Brek Finnegan as administrator. Bond is fixed at the amount of $10,000.00. Order signed. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Continued To Jul-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Continued To Jul-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for PA. John J. Alkazin appearing for Brek Finnegan. Charles Morgan
appearing for parties who intend to file a petition for probate. All counsel agree to have the Public Administrator appointed as Special Administrator with general powers. Court wants the PA to file a petition for appointment of special administrator with general powers. Both petition are continued to 7/12. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lois Baty.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Continued To Jun-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
